---
title: "Visium_Differential_Ploting"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2026-02-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(data.table)

# Load results
results <- fread("/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/Visium_samples/Visium_Data/samples/DC1_IM_vs_CT_additive.csv")

# Cap FDR at a more reasonable level for visualization
results$fdr_capped <- pmax(results$fdr, 1e-100)

# Select genes to label
top_hits <- results$primerid[results$fdr < 1e-50 & abs(results$logFC) > 0.75]

# Create volcano plot
EnhancedVolcano(results,
    lab = results$primerid,
    x = 'logFC',
    y = 'fdr_capped',
    selectLab = top_hits,
    title = 'Invasive Margin vs Core Tumor',
    subtitle = 'DC1 cells',
    xlim = c(-2, 2),
    ylim = c(0, 105),
    pCutoff = 0.01,
    FCcutoff = 0.5,
    pointSize = 1.5,
    labSize = 3.0,
    labFace = 'italic',
    colAlpha = 0.6,
    drawConnectors = TRUE,
    widthConnectors = 0.4,
    colConnectors = 'grey50',
    maxoverlapsConnectors = 25,
    legendPosition = 'bottom',
    legendLabels = c('NS', 'Log2 FC', 'FDR', 'FDR & Log2 FC')
)
```
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(Matrix)
library(pheatmap)

base_path <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/Visium_samples/Visium_Data/samples/"

# Load results
results <- fread(file.path(base_path, "DC1_IM_vs_CT_additive.csv"))

# Load expression data
counts <- readMM(file.path(base_path, "DC1_mast_counts.mtx"))
metadata <- fread(file.path(base_path, "DC1_mast_metadata.csv"))
gene_info <- fread(file.path(base_path, "DC1_mast_gene_info.csv"))

library(pheatmap)

# Fix gene names - skip the empty first entry
gene_names <- gene_info$V1[-1]
spot_ids <- metadata$V1

# Set row/column names
rownames(counts) <- gene_names
colnames(counts) <- spot_ids

# Filter to genes detected in >25% of spots
well_detected <- names(detection_rate[detection_rate > 0.25])
results_filtered <- results[primerid %in% well_detected]

# Check how many genes pass
length(well_detected)

# Get top genes from filtered set
top_up <- results_filtered[direction == "Up_in_IM" & fdr < 0.01][order(-abs(logFC))][1:25, primerid]
top_down <- results_filtered[direction == "Down_in_IM" & fdr < 0.01][order(-abs(logFC))][1:25, primerid]
top_genes_filtered <- c(top_up, top_down)

# Check detection rates for these genes
sapply(top_genes_filtered, function(g) round(detection_rate[g] * 100, 1))

# Remake heatmap
expr_subset <- as.matrix(counts[top_genes_filtered, ])
expr_log <- log1p(expr_subset)
expr_plot_ordered <- expr_log[, sampled_spots][, spot_order]

pheatmap(expr_plot_ordered,
         scale = "row",
         show_colnames = FALSE,
         annotation_col = annotation_col,
         annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
         cluster_cols = FALSE,
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100),
         breaks = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 101),
         main = "Top DE Genes: IM vs CT (DC1, >25% detection)")
```
```{r}
# What genes are in the heatmap?
print(top_genes)

# Check if CLEC17A is in our top genes
"CLEC17A" %in% top_genes

# Look at CLEC17A expression
summary(as.numeric(counts["CLEC17A", ]))

# How many spots have zero expression?
sum(counts["CLEC17A", ] == 0)
length(counts["CLEC17A", ])

# Check a few other genes for comparison
summary(as.numeric(counts["EPCAM", ]))
sum(counts["EPCAM", ] == 0)

# Expression by region
table(counts["CLEC17A", ] > 0, metadata$region)

# What's its logFC and component p-values?
results[primerid == "CLEC17A"]


```
